nuggets.headline: jamee cornelia balanced a punk band with a hip-hop collective for years
nuggets.text: Before becoming the solo artist you hear now, Jamee Cornelia was simultaneously a lead vocalist for a punk band called Howling Star for four years. At the same time, she was also active in a hip-hop collective named Visibly Inflight, showcasing her diverse musical range across genres.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: I was also a lead vocalist for a punk band called Howling Star for 4 years and we started our own concert series called Punk Black while I was also in a hip-hop collective called Visibly Inflight for my solo work.

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia, a multifaceted artist from the Atlanta area.

nuggets.headline: jamee cornelia co-runs an indie label named after a high school dream
nuggets.text: Beyond making her own music, Jamee Cornelia is deeply involved in the industry's infrastructure. She still directs music videos and, with friends from her old collective Visibly Inflight, she co-runs an indie label called L7 Records. The label's name actually comes from a store she dreamed of opening for her clothing company back in high school.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: Currently, I still release solo music under Jamee Cornelia as well as direct music videos and me and the friends of the group I use to be in called Visibly Inflight run our own indie label “L7 Records” named after this store I wanted to open up for my clothing company back in high school at Marietta Square.

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia, an artist and label co-runner.

nuggets.headline: if you like 'slack,' check out atlanta's yani mo
nuggets.text: If you're digging Jamee Cornelia's sound, you absolutely need to explore Yani Mo. Both artists are integral voices in the vibrant Atlanta hip-hop scene, crafting thoughtful and compelling music that reflects the distinct energy of their shared musical community.

source.title: Jamee Cornelia - Songs, Events and Music Stats | Viberate.com
source.quoteSnippet: Jamee Cornelia, a native of Decatur, Georgia, is a rising talent in the Hip Hop music industry.

artistSummary: Jamee Cornelia is a dynamic hip-hop and alternative hip-hop artist from the Atlanta area, known for her thought-provoking lyrics and unique sound. Beyond her solo music, she's a multi-talented creative who directs music videos and co-runs an indie label.
